Video.summary: A woman wants the truth from her sister and boyfriend; a woman must decide between two men; a woman hooks up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: My Stripper Sister Strikes Again

Video.summary: Nick's girlfriend finds out why he spends so much time with their neighbor; Osha's boyfriend scored with his female friend; Brandi resents her boyfriend's reckless behavior after all of the sacrifices she has made to keep their relationship.
Video.title: Clingy Chicks

Video.summary: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!
Video.title: Ex-lovers Return!

Video.summary: Fists fly when Cee Cee proposes to her boyfriend on the show; old flames come out of the woodwork to profess their love for Summer; Jon confesses a shocking secret to the woman he wants to marry.
Video.title: Half-Baked Proposals

Video.summary: Scotty says he feels like his girlfriend has a GPS on him 24/7; Giovanni blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; Winona wants to spice things up in the bedroom.
Video.title: Mistresses Reeled In

Video.summary: Tia says she has proof that her brother-in-law cheats on her sister; Maranda wants to get back together with her ex-fiance but believes it could stir up problems with her best friend; Kaila wants a threesome.
Video.title: Man Snatching Sister

Video.summary: T-Jay says it is time to share his deep, dark secret with the woman he has been seeing; Natasha wants to marry her baby's father, but he is miserable in the relationship; Sasha's boyfriend betrayed her trust.
Video.title: One Night Stands Reunited

Video.summary: Antiatte's friend and sister determine whether she will accept her boyfriend's marriage proposal; two women battle it out for a porn star's love; Britanny says something is fishy about her boyfriend's behavior.
Video.title: Proposal Do-Over

Video.summary: Angelica is unapologetic about sleeping with her twin's boyfriend; Makayla confronts the woman with whom her children's father hooked up; Stormy wants to take a shower with her friend Jessica.
Video.title: Steamy Sister Sex

Video.summary: Andre and Champaign’s online relationship took off, but she must admit that she’s actually a he! Shane will marry Michelle, but he’s been fulfilling his fantasy with a Dominatrix! Brandy’s wild job now involves her sister’s boyfriend!
Video.title: Trick or Treat

Video.summary: Sparks fly as Victoria confronts the man who stole her man! Can cash strapped Stacy win Janelle back from Big?
Video.title: Cheating Secrets Explode

Video.summary: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.
Video.title: Unforgettable Guests Return

Video.summary: Mike is ready to end his relationship with his girlfriend because of her jealous ways; Jared admits a secret; Barry hopes to prove to an exotic dancer that he is not a typical customer and wants a chance at love.
Video.title: Fooled by a Fake Friend

Video.summary: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!
Video.title: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Image.alt: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Video.summary: Khristal's significant other does not take kindly to Billy's advances; a secret revelation puts a kibosh on April's marriage; Meghan wants to reunite with her online boyfriend, who confesses to having had an affair.
Video.title: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Image.alt: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Video.summary: Brady proposes to his ex-girlfriend, then she learns he cheated with her friend; Dillon feels he has to come clean about an advance he made toward his fiancee's friend.
Video.title: It Was a 1 Night Smash

Video.summary: Becca wants to rekindle her relationship with her ex, who has a pregnant new girlfriend; best friends Cory, Jess and Juan find themselves in a love triangle; siblings Keimo and Keke learn that their significant others have hooked up.
Video.title: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Image.alt: You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me
You're Pregnant by Him, but It Should Be Me

Video.summary: Kim and Kristie are identical twins and Kristie is planning to marry Michael but there’s a catch. Later Louis has some explaining to do. His lover of 8 years has just informed his wife of their affair!
Video.title: My Twin Slept With My Man!

Image.alt: My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!
My Twin Slept With My Man!

Video.summary: A woman is ready to give up nine years of marriage; a woman confronts her husband and his Internet lover.
Video.title: 7 Kids, a Trucker & Waffles

Video.summary: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.
Video.title: Triple Ex!

Video.summary: Carla has been cheating on her man with his best friend and his sister! Next Yvonne will tell her friend, Marie, that she's been sleeping with her boyfriend. Then Mary Sue and her secret lover, Cory, are here to confront Mary Sue's boyfriend, Scott.
Video.title: Honey, I'm Leaving You!

Video.summary: A woman thinks her friend is sleeping with someone she is also dating; a man wants his girlfriend back after she leaves; a woman tries to save her friend from what she thinks is a bad relationship.
Video.title: Boyfriend Stealing Bestie

Video.summary: Sony wants to know if Mobetta has been unfaithful.
Video.title: Rappers Battle... For Love

Video.summary: Audrina is prepared to get to the bottom of rumors that her boyfriend slept with her strip-club co-worker; Ashley's husband wants her permission to have sex with other women; Stephanie's revelation may ruin her bond with her newfound sister.
Video.title: Stripper Slapfest

Video.summary: Aubrey wants out of his relationship with his angry, bossy girlfriend; Savonnah says she does not trust her girlfriend; Victoria met a woman on a dating website, but secretly has a crush on the woman's brother.
Video.title: I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You

Image.alt: I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You
I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You
I Stopped Being a Lesbian for You

Video.summary: RJ has to choose between the rockstar lifestyle or settling down with his girlfriend Elaina. Janyce learns her roommate Angel has been sharing her man David! Fed up with Stacy, Brandon lets her in on a little secret!
Video.title: I'm A Rockstar, Baby

Video.summary: Strippers Precious and Jewels have too much in common; John learns that his friend is responsible for the downturn in his marriage; DJ's girlfriend wants to see other people.
Video.title: She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Image.alt: She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!
She Took My Man ... and My Car!

Video.summary: Percy must choose between his baby-mama and his other woman; Mary learns that her fiance has messed around with her friend; Casey wonders whether she should get back together with a man who constantly lies.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Deception

Video.summary: Paige disapproves of her sister's boyfriend and devises a plan to get her to leave him; another woman may foil Derek's plans to make his girlfriend a permanent part of his life; Tony wants his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: I Was Set Up!

Video.summary: Torrance admits to cheating on his girlfriend with a transsexual. Then, Heather wants her boyfriend’s ex Tramisha to stop interfering with their relationship.
Video.title: Sizzling Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Destiny admits to cheating on her live-in boyfriend with a one-night stand; an all-out battle ensues after Kashe confesses to hooking up with her cousin's girlfriend; two men challenge each other to an eating contest to win Amber.
Video.title: Chronic Cheaters

Video.summary: Iris threw her husband, Wayne, out of the house during a fight, but she never expected he would find a new love so soon. She will confront her husband's new lover, Janie, a woman born with no hands and no feet.
Video.title: You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!
